name: Chocolate Chip Pecan Pie/Crisco
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crust, prepare Crisco Single Crust. Do not bake.
Heat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. For the filling, beat eggs in a large bowl at low speed of an electric mixer until blended. Stir in sugar, corn syrup, melted Golden Crisco shortening, vanilla, and salt with a spoon until blended. Stir in nuts, chocolate chips, and bourbon.
3. Pour into the unbaked pie crust. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 55 to 60 minutes, or until set. Cover the edge with foil if necessary to prevent overbrowning. Cool to room temperature before serving. Refrigerate leftover pie.
